content: File larger than this size won't be uploaded.

comment.text: This text explains the maximum file size allowed for uploads. It appears in the uploader component, likely displayed to the user to inform them why a file may not be uploaded. Translators should ensure the description accurately reflects the file size limit.

usage.context:
? config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFoldersSizeDescription")
 : t("MaximumFilesSizeDescription")
 : config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSizeDescription")
 : t("MaximumFileSizeDescription")
 }
 configKey="maxPerUploadSize"
 defaultValue="25"
 sizeUnits={fileSizeUnits}
 defaultUnit={defaultSizeUnit}
